The Deal
A fully-entitled, construction-ready mixed-use development in one of Brooklyn's most established and in-demand residential neighborhoods.
105
Residential Units

Target IRR
9201 4th Avenue is a brand-new mixed-use development featuring 105 residential condominiums, 185 underground parking spaces, and 14,000 sf of ground-floor commercial space in Bay Ridge, Brooklyn. Zoning approval (C4-4D) was secured May 14, 2026 — a meaningful de-risking milestone that precedes investor capital deployment. The project is sponsored by Allied Properties, a 30-year vertically-integrated NYC real estate firm with in-house construction, maintenance, and brokerage.
02
Why This Deal
Investment Highlights
01
Zoning Secured — Entitlement Risk Eliminated
C4-4D approval secured May 14, 2026. Entitlement risk — historically the most uncertain phase of NYC development — has been resolved prior to investor capital deployment.
02
Supply-Constrained Market with Proven Demand
Bay Ridge attracts 1.42× more listing views than the US average (Zillow, 2025). Typical days on market: 48–75. New construction supply remains limited due to established zoning and neighborhood character.
03
$171.9M Diversified Sell-Out
Revenue across residential condominiums, MIH affordable units, 185 parking spots, and 14,000 sf of ground-floor commercial space — four structurally independent exit streams.
04
Priced-Out Buyer Migration Tailwind
Sustained price appreciation in Park Slope, Brooklyn Heights, and Williamsburg continues to direct buyer demand toward Bay Ridge. Underwritten at $1,350 PSF — consistent with recent Bay Ridge comparable sales.
05
30-Year Vertically Integrated Sponsor
Allied Properties — in-house construction (Axium), maintenance (Axium), and brokerage (Discovery Realty). Aligned incentives, controlled costs.
06
Data-Verified Location — Top 22% of US Urban Neighborhoods
Walk Score 100 · Transit Score 100 · Crime 34% below national average (FBI UCR). 10 parks within a half-mile radius (OpenStreetMap). 5 schools serving the catchment area (NCES). Independent data confirms what the market already prices in.

06
Bay Ridge & South Brooklyn
The Neighborhood
Waterfront
$21M
Shore Road Promenade renovation — approved & funded. Direct Narrows waterfront access with Verrazzano views.
Parks & Green Space
28+ Acres
Owl’s Head Park (24 ac), Narrows Botanical Gardens (4.5 ac), Vinland Playground — all walkable.
Community Tenure
159 Yrs
Oldest continuously running Memorial Day Parade in the U.S. Bay Ridge has never lost its identity.
Public Investment Signal
$21M Shore Road Promenade renovation — approved & funded
$9.25M Leif Ericson Park renovation — currently funded
New pickleball + tennis courts at John J. Carty Park beneath Verrazzano Bridge
Public synthetic track & turf — Fort Hamilton HS, open to community
Why Buyers Choose Bay Ridge
Waterfront access without Manhattan prices — established residential stock
52-year street fair on 3rd Ave — 25 blocks, tens of thousands of attendees annually
Multi-generational community fabric — Italian, Greek, Arab-American, Scandinavian roots
Strong schools, accessible transit — consistent out-of-state relocation demand

Execution
Development Timeline
Month 0 ✓
Land Acquisition COMPLETE
Site secured at 9201 4th Avenue, Bay Ridge, Brooklyn
May 14, 2026 ✓

Axium Construction (Allied affiliate) — $225 PSF hard costs + 10% contingency. 147,697 sf total build.

Discovery Realty (Allied affiliate) leads sales. Pre-sales commencing during construction cycle.

6–9 month closing period. Investor distributions upon condo closings.

30–36

Key Advantage
Land acquisition and zoning approval are both complete. Investors enter at the construction stage, with the two historically most uncertain pre-construction phases already resolved.

Sensitivity Drivers
PSF Pricing — Every +$50/SF adds ~$7.4M to gross revenue. $1,350 is the floor, not the ceiling.

Absorption Speed — 48–75 day Bay Ridge market supports full sell-out within 6–9 months of completion.

Construction Costs — Axium in-house mitigates overrun risk vs third-party GC.

Full sensitivity table provided with offering documents.
11
Sponsor
Allied Properties LLC
30+ years · New York Metropolitan Area · Vertically Integrated
Allied Properties is a fully-integrated real estate investment company specializing in the acquisition, restructure, repositioning, development, marketing, and management of real estate assets throughout the New York Metropolitan Area.

The portfolio encompasses multi-family residential properties, condominium developments, Section 8 / HUD subsidized housing, office buildings, shopping centers, and retail centers.

Allied's competitive advantage is its unique ability to position — or reposition — properties in a specific market, moving swiftly to take advantage of rare opportunities while employing value engineering and cost-benefit analysis at every stage. A steady stream of proprietary deal flow stems from 30+ years of established NYC relationships.
Axium Construction
Registered GC — manages all 3rd party and sub-contractor relationships for new construction and rehab. Directly incentivized to control costs.
Axium Maintenance
On-site maintenance affiliate managing capital improvements across the existing Allied portfolio.
Discovery Realty Group
Licensed brokerage sourcing transactions and managing condo sales for Allied developments. In-house sales reduces commission exposure.
30+
Years
3
In-House Verticals
NYC
Focus Market
12
Risk Assessment
Key Risks & Mitigants
Low
Entitlement / Zoning
Eliminated. C4-4D approval secured May 14, 2026. No investor capital deployed before zoning was confirmed.
Low
Sales & Absorption
Bay Ridge 48–75 day absorption. 1.42× national listing views. Discovery Realty in-house. $1,350 PSF is conservative vs Manhattan-adjacent comps.
Moderate
Construction Cost Overrun
Axium Construction is Allied-owned — aligned incentives. 10% contingency built in. $225 PSF hard cost is NYC market-validated for this building type.
Moderate
Interest Rate / Financing
Construction loan terms to be finalized. 24-month build limits exposure window. Rate sensitivity to be modeled in full offering documents.
Moderate
Market / Pricing Risk
NYC housing demand remains structural. Bay Ridge buyer pool driven by priced-out migration — relatively recession-resilient. Conservative PSF assumption creates upside buffer.
Monitor
NYC Regulatory / Policy
Allied's 30+ year track record provides regulatory navigation depth. MIH compliance built in from inception. Active monitoring of NYC housing policy changes.
